hud.tagline: One shared sandbox: same assets, same controls, same feature probes in every SDK.
overview: Press 1, 2, or 3 to switch between the 2D, 3D, and Hybrid scenes.
Move with WASD or the arrow keys to verify input, motion, and sprite updates.
Press SPACE to unlock audio and play the shared sandbox tone.
Open a second sandbox instance to watch localhost networking discover a peer.
next_steps: Top-right shows live capabilities, scene state, networking, and backend details.
Bottom panel tells you what to try next instead of leaving the scene unexplained.
Web keeps unsupported desktop controls visible and explicitly capability-gated.

capability_gates.web_networking: Browser/WASM keeps the networking panel visible, but localhost host/client parity is not faked here.
capability_gates.web_renderer: This browser/runtime did not expose a WebGPU adapter, so Sandbox is running in renderer capability-gated mode.
